failures.description: The agent misread or misused the ProductCatalogSearch result by selecting the last and most expensive listed item instead of the first and cheapest item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The tool call was correct and returned 11 available Electric Kettles sorted by ascending price. The first item in the result, item_id 1240311797 at $137.17, was the cheapest. At step 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item_id 2243454707 at $164.46 was cheapest, which contradicts the tool output. The Evaluator then repeated the same mistake, but the root cause was already present in the Executor's interpretation.
